## ProductionTools.IFillingSlotManagerProps.onAddSlot property

Callback when user wants to add a new slot. If not provided, the "Add slot" button shows an inline name input. If provided, the callback handles showing the name input UI.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onAddSlot?: () => void;
```
